Join the Collective

Our Story

By Artists, For Artists

Public Art Collective (PAC) is a nonprofit organization based in Tampa Bay, Florida that supports and advocates for public artists.

We believe artists deserve fair compensation, creative freedom, and real opportunities. Whether you're a muralist, street artist, or installation creator, PAC exists to connect you with projects that map the cultural DNA of our cities.

The Creative Ecosystem

  • Overspray Art Space
    A creative hub and spray paint studio welcoming artists of all skill levels.
  • Vitale Bros
    A professional mural business foundational to the Tampa Bay scene.
  • Public Art Collective
    The nonprofit arm expanding opportunities and advocacy for creatives.

PAC

Connecting muralists, street artists, and public artists with paid opportunities. For artists, by artists.
